source_text: Look into my eyes Do you see fear?
translated_text: 看着我的眼睛你看到恐惧吗?

source_text: You come at me with sword and spear
But I come in the name of the God of Israel
translated_text: 但我是以以色列的上帝的名义来的.

source_text: Of course not okay, then one more time tally tally
translated_text: 当然不好,然后再一次查看查看

source_text: I'm trying to protect us from this Philistine
translated_text: 我试图保护我们免于这个非利士人.

source_text: Come on back to your mom right Philistine
translated_text: 现在回来看你的吧,菲利士特

source_text: Of course that one you saw I'm coming girl. I will bring her home safely tally wait. No there you go
translated_text: 当然,那个你看到的我来了,我会把她带回家.
